page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Conditional out-of-distribution generation for unpaired data using transfer VAE.

A Keras (tensorflow < 2.0) implementation of trVAE (transfer Variational Autoencoder) .

Train trVAE with Kang or Haber dataset.

Then you can run each notebook and reproduce the results.

All datasets are available in this drive directory.
